name: Emiri Uchi
description:
Emoji from WataMote!

After being placed in the same group as Tomoko during a school trip and witnessing her eccentric behavior, as well as due to a series of misunderstandings, Tomoko's "true nature" became firmly rooted in Uchi mind. Since then, she hasn't been able to do anything about her growing interest in this repulsive person.
creator: bula
